title: Investigate FPGA feasibility for ultra-low latency FEC
description: Research phase to evaluate FPGA acceleration for FEC decoding. Phase 1 (feasibility study): Survey existing FPGA LDPC implementations, analyze resource utilization (LUTs, DSPs, BRAM) for DVB-T2, estimate latency/throughput for target FPGA (Xilinx VU9P), cost-benefit vs GPU vs CPU. Phase 2 (prototype): Implement Viterbi decoder in Verilog/VHDL on Xilinx Alveo U250, PCIe DMA interface, benchmark vs CPU. Target: 1-10 Gbps sustained, <10us latency.
